Sncg 4-archetype NMF — rotatable tetrahedrons

Hover over a cell on the left to see its expression of the genes on the right. Hover over a gene on the right to see its expression in the cells on the left.
About this app (click to expand)
Cells (151; subtype-coloured by default) embed in a 4-vertex tetrahedron whose vertices are the 4 NMF archetypes (fit on 299 panel HVG). Consensus stability silhouette: 0.998. Genes embed via column-normalised H: the 299 panel HVG inherit their NMF H; the 3238 broader genes (top by mean log-CPM in Sncg) get their loadings via NNLS projection onto the same W — labelled "imputed" on hover.
Hover a gene → cells recolour by expression; hover a cell → genes recolour. The 4 large dots outside each tetrahedron's vertices show that hovered point's archetype loadings (magma: 0 black → 1 white). Drag inside a pyramid to rotate; right-click + drag to pan; scroll to zoom. Vertices: A1 = Gad2, A2 = Tspan7, A3 = Gad2, A4 = Ndufa13. No subtype-level outliers excluded.
Gene set:
Min mean expr (log-CPM): 0.00 Min dispersion (std): 0.00 Visible: 299 / 3537
Hover a cell (left) or a gene (right) to colour by expression. Big dots outside the vertices show that point's archetype loadings (magma 0→1).
Cell default colours (subtype): Serpinf1 Aqp5 Vip    Serpinf1 Clrn1    Sncg Gpr50    Sncg Slc17a8    Sncg Vip Itih5    Sncg Vip Nptx2   
Gene default colours (dominant archetype): A1 (Gad2)    A2 (Tspan7)    A3 (Gad2)    A4 (Ndufa13)
